arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Tottenham Hotspur: Lucas Chevalier to make his debut, João Neves suspended
arts.sum: Champions League winners PSG take on Europa League holders Tottenham Hotspur for tonight’s UEFA Super Cup tie. The game will be played in Udine’s Stadio Friuli. Luis Enrique’s Les Parisiens will try…

arts.ttl: How can I watch the UEFA Super Cup final where Tottenham take on PSG?
arts.sum: European champions Paris Saint-Germain will take on Europa League winners Tottenham Hotspur tonight in what surely has to be one of the most exciting games of this soon-to-end close season. Tottenham has been forced into making some serious changes ahead of this one due to injury and, in an interesting twist, an internal disciplinary issue. The post How can I watch the UEFA Super Cup final where Tottenham take on PSG? appeared first on The Boy Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs PSG – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham make the trip to Udine to face Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Super Cup on Wednesday evening. The Europa League winners will look to claim their second piece of silverware in three months against the Champions League holders at the Stadio Friuli. arts.ttl: PSG/Tottenham – Paris line-up according to the press: A grand premiere and a classic
arts.sum: This Wednesday, in the 2025 European Super Cup, Paris Saint-Germain will face Tottenham at the Bluenergy Stadium in Udine (kickoff at 9 p.m., broadcast on Canal+). Ahead of the match, the press has been trying to guess which players Paris coach Luis Enrique will field. Le Parisien (4-3-3) – Kvaratskhelia – Dembélé – Doué Ruiz […]

arts.ttl: PSG look to add fifth trophy against Tottenham
arts.sum: One month after the end of the best season in their history, Paris St-Germain kick off the new one with the chance to win yet another trophy, against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Gianluigi Donnarumma's Spurs absence speaks volumes and could change Premier League season
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma has confirmed he will leave Paris Saint-Germain this summer after a heated contract dispute, and the Italian is good enough to change the upcoming Premier League season

arts.ttl: How to watch PSG vs Tottenham in UEFA Super Cup today
arts.sum: Tottenham have a daunting challenge in the form of European champions Paris Saint-Germain ahead of them.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs PSG: Solanke starts in Super Cup
arts.sum: Thomas Frank could welcome a hugely important figure back into his starting XI on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Tottenham won't have to deal with star PSG midfielder in UEFA Super Cup
arts.sum: PSG will be without a suspended starting midfielder for Wednesday's Super Cup.
